ruin.description: A returning gateway linked back to overworld at coordinates [5, 5].

history: [Year 1] Outpost Aethelgard Outpost founded by Alexander.

ruin.name: Smoking Crater Outpost
ruin.description: Rich in stellar materials from a celestial impact.

chronicle: The multi-dimensional cosmos awakens.
The founding capital of Valoria Prime was established on the Overworld at [-1, -1]. Exploring the uncharted realms begins...
[Year 1] Player Alexander founded settlement: Aethelgard Outpost on underworld at [15, 10].
[Year 2] RESEARCH: Players unlocked technology [Basic Flint Tooling]!
[Year 3] CLIMATE: A severe blizzard froze outer sectors. Fuel wood consumption doubled.
[Year 4] RESEARCH: Valoria unlocked technology [Basic Flint Tooling]!
[Year 4] METEOR STRIKE: A roaring meteorite struck the ground at [0, 0] in space, leaving a burning crater of astralmetal.
[Year 4] SEA MONSTER SIGHTING: A giant kraken was spotted in the oceanic waters at [-15, 10]!
[Year 8] RESEARCH: Valoria unlocked technology [Primitive Shelters]!
[Year 8] DECLARATION OF WAR: Valoria declared war on Players!
[Year 8] METEOR STRIKE: A roaring meteorite struck the ground at [1, -2] in aether, leaving a burning crater of astralmetal.
[Year 10] RESEARCH: Players unlocked technology [Primitive Shelters]!
[Year 11] CONSTRUCTION: Valoria Prime built an Apothecary to protect citizens from plagues.
[Year 11] CLIMATE: A severe blizzard froze outer sectors. Fuel wood consumption doubled.
[Year 12] CLIMATE: Heavy torrential rains triggered a Spring Flood across kingdoms, boosting vegetation growth.
[Year 12] PLAGUE OUTBREAK: Outbreak center detected at Valoria Prime in overworld [-1, -1]! Sickness is spreading.
[Year 12] MEDICAL RELIEF: Apothecary structure successfully cured the plague outbreak in Valoria Prime.
[Year 13] PEACE TREATY: Armistice signed between Valoria and Players.
[Year 14] RESEARCH: Valoria unlocked technology [Sailing & Watercraft]!
[Year 18] CONSTRUCTION: Aethelgard Outpost built an Apothecary to protect citizens from plagues.
[Year 19] RESEARCH: Valoria unlocked technology [Carriage Vehicles]!
[Year 19] CLIMATE: A severe blizzard froze outer sectors. Fuel wood consumption doubled.

[Year 21] EXPANSION: Valoria expanded to [-1, 0] in overworld, building Riverbend of Valoria.
[Year 23] EXPANSION: Valoria expanded to [-2, -1] in overworld, building Aethercliff of Valoria.
[Year 23] Winter Crisis: Citizens in Stonefort of Valoria are freezing due to lack of timber reserves!
[Year 23] RESEARCH: Players unlocked technology [Sailing & Watercraft]!
[Year 24] EXPANSION: Valoria expanded to [-2, -2] in overworld, building Evergreen of Valoria.
[Year 24] CIVIL WAR: Ideological split in Valoria! Rebel faction Oakhaven seized control of 2 settlements.
[Year 25] CONSTRUCTION: Valoria Prime established a Bio-Laboratory facility for genetic upgrades.
[Year 26] BATTLE LOSS: Settlement Evergreen of Valoria was razed during combat.
[Year 27] PEACE TREATY: Armistice signed between Valoria and Oakhaven.
